summary: Iteration 67 - Genre-specific Poster Backgrounds & Director Images Testing Complete. Backend: ALL 11 TESTS PASSED. Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly, Ciak! button works, director images verified accessible. No pending films available to test shooting confirmation dialog with director images.

issues: Donation popup frequently blocks UI interactions. Must dismiss with Escape key.

backend.POST /api/ai/poster thriller fallback: PASS - Returns 220KB poster with thriller background image
backend.POST /api/ai/poster comedy fallback: PASS - Returns 341KB poster with comedy background image
backend.POST /api/ai/poster romance fallback: PASS - Returns 271KB poster with romance background image
backend.POST /api/ai/poster action fallback: PASS - Returns 87KB poster with gradient fallback (no genre image)
backend.production_house_name auto-injection: PASS - User's production_house_name injected when not provided

frontend.Dashboard loads: PASS - All elements visible including welcome message, stats, film cards
frontend.Shooting dialog opens: PASS - 'CIAK, SI GIRA!' dialog opens from Ciak! button
frontend.Director images accessible: PASS - Both /images/shooting/director_female.jpeg and director_male.jpeg return HTTP 200
frontend.Director image in shooting dialog: CODE VERIFIED - Dashboard.jsx line 696-697: randomly selects director image, line 769: displays in dialog

critical_code_review_comments: Genre poster backgrounds correctly implemented: GENRE_POSTER_IMAGES dict maps 'thriller', 'romance', 'comedy' to image paths
Fallback poster function (_generate_fallback_poster) correctly checks for genre image, falls back to gradient if not found
Text overlay correctly added to ALL fallback posters: title in large font + 'un film [production_house_name]' in smaller font
Director image randomization correctly implemented in Dashboard.jsx: 50/50 chance of male/female director
Production house name auto-injection works in both /api/ai/poster and /api/ai/poster/start endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - used existing account, no pending films available for shooting dialog test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Genre-specific poster backgrounds (thriller, romance, comedy) fully implemented and working. Director images (male/female) are accessible at /images/shooting/director_*.jpeg and code correctly randomizes them in Dashboard.jsx. No pending films exist to test the shooting confirmation dialog visually with director image, but code review confirms correct implementation. Donation popup frequently blocks UI - dismiss with Escape key.

verified_features.Action poster gradient fallback: VERIFIED - No genre image, produces ~87KB gradient-based poster
verified_features.Text overlay on all fallback posters: VERIFIED - Title + 'un film [production house]' drawn at bottom with shadow
verified_features.Director image randomization: CODE VERIFIED - Dashboard.jsx line 696: Math.random() < 0.5 selects female/male
verified_features.Director image display: CODE VERIFIED - Dashboard.jsx line 769: img src uses _directorImg property
verified_features.Production house auto-injection: VERIFIED - Both endpoints inject user.production_house_name when not provided
